nasb.text: You shall mount on it four rows of stones; the first row shall be a row of ruby, topaz and emerald;

esv.text: You shall set in it four rows of stones. A row of sardius, topaz, and carbuncle shall be the first row;

cnv.text: 你要在胸牌上面鑲上四行寶石：第一行是紅寶石、黃玉、翡翠；

ccb.text: 上面要镶上四行宝石：第一行是红宝石、黄玉和翠玉；
